text: Fix detail-page text overflow and MVTec source-image classification.
Classify generated MVTec model visualization panels and normalize persisted metadata.
Apply visual evidence normalization when loading legacy run manifests.
Wrap Evidence Summary and Artifacts values with breakable spans.
Constrain Analysis Detail cards, selectors, descriptions, and artifact lists to avoid text overflow.
Lock visual-evidence title/note metadata for generated MVTec visualization panels.
